name: @prose-minion/core
description: Prose Minion shared core: presentation (webview React), application handlers, domain, infrastructure (AI services, metrics, dictionary, publishing standards, word-frequency/NLP, resources), shared contracts, and the vscode-free platform ports. Consumed by apps/* shells via the public barrel src/index.ts. Never imports vscode or electron.
//sideEffects: Core is a pure library EXCEPT its webview CSS imports (side-effectful via style-loader). NEVER set this to `false` — that would drop every webview stylesheet from the bundle.
